conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 13 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Treatment Class
Definition: What is the categorization or classification of the treatment or therapy received by participants in the clinical trial?. If reported, provide the value; otherwise use 'Not reported'.
  A: value="Hormone therapy; Androgen Deprivation Therapy (ADT)" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The abstract and introduction describe the treatments as 'hormone therapy' and 'androgen deprivation therapy (ADT)', with abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP) as an addition to standard-of-care ADT."
  B: value="Hormone therapy" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 1 mentions 'Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone for metastatic patients starting hormone therapy'. Page 2 abstract mentions 'long-term hormone therapy for prostate cancer'."

---
Column 2: Trial
Definition: What name of the clinical study or experiment being referenced?. If reported, provide the value; otherwise use 'Not reported'.
  A: value="STAMPEDE randomised trial (NCT00268476)" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The trial name and identifier are prominently displayed in the title and abstract."
  B: value="STAMPEDE randomised trial (NCT00268476)" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Clearly stated on page 1."

---
Column 3: Type of Therapy
Definition: What is the description of the type of treatment or intervention provided to participants in the clinical trial?. If reported, provide the value; otherwise use 'Not reported'.
  A: value="Androgen Deprivation Therapy (ADT) + Abiraterone acetate + prednisolone" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The abstract states 'Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP) previously demonstrated improved survival in STAMPEDE... Standard-of-care (SOC) was androgen deprivation therapy.' and 'The comparison randomised patients 1:1 to SOC-alone with or without daily abiraterone acetate 1000 mg + prednisolon"
  B: value="Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP) and androgen deprivation therapy (ADT)" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 1 mentions 'Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone'. Page 2 abstract mentions 'Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP)' and 'Standard-of-care (SOC) was androgen deprivation therapy.'"

---
Column 4: Docetaxel administration - N (%) | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial who received docetaxel before or during the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document mentions docetaxel as 'further treatment' after first disease progression, not as part of the initial randomized treatment arms or administered before/during the primary trial treatment phase."
  B: value="40%" | page=7 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 7 states 'Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year after first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048).' This refers to administration *after* first progression, not necessarily before or during the trial, but it's the o"

---
Column 5: Docetaxel administration - N (%) | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants who received docetaxel before or during the trial in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document mentions docetaxel as 'further treatment' after first disease progression, not as part of the initial randomized treatment arms or administered before/during the primary trial treatment phase."
  B: value="32%" | page=7 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 7 states 'Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year after first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048).' This refers to administration *after* first progression, not necessarily before or during the trial, but it's the o"

---
Column 6: Median Age (years) | Treatment
Definition: What median age in years of participants included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="67" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 1, 'Age (years)' row, 'Median (IQR)' for 'SOC + AAP' column."
  B: value="67 (IQR 62-71)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="Page 5, Table 1 'Baseline characteristics' under 'SOC + AAP' arm."

---
Column 7: Median Age (years) | Control
Definition: What the median age of participants included in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="67" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 1, 'Age (years)' row, 'Median (IQR)' for 'SOC-alone' column."
  B: value="67 (IQR 62-72)" | page=5 | modality=table | reasoning="Page 5, Table 1 'Baseline characteristics' under 'SOC-alone' arm."

---
Column 8: Median On-Treatment Duration (mo) | Treatment
Definition: What is the median duration in months that participants in the treatment arm of the trial received on-treatment therapy? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="29" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states: 'Median time on abiraterone in the SOC + AAP group was 29 months (IQR 12-71)'."
  B: value="29 months (IQR 12-71)" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 6 states 'Median time on abiraterone in the SOC + AAP group was 29 months (IQR 12-71)'."

---
Column 9: Median On-Treatment Duration (mo) | Control
Definition: What is the median duration in months of participants receiving treatment in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The control arm received 'lifelong ADT', but a specific median on-treatment duration in months is not reported for this group in a comparable manner to the experimental drug."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The control arm (SOC-alone) received ADT, which is described as 'lifelong ADT' on page 4, but no median duration is provided for the control arm."

---
Column 10: No. of Deaths - N | Treatment
Definition: What the number of participants who died in the treatment arm of the clinical trial?.
  A: value="244" | page=6 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 2, 'Overall survival' section, 'Events' row for 'SOC + AAP' column."
  B: value="244" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 6 states 'Deaths were reported in 573/1003 (57%) participants including 329 (66%) in the SOC-alone group and 244 (49%) in the SOC + AAP group'. Also confirmed in Table 2, Page 6, under 'Overall survival' for 'SOC ± AAP' arm."

---
Column 11: No. of Deaths - N | Control
Definition: What number of deaths that occurred in the control arm of the clinical trial?.
  A: value="329" | page=6 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 2, 'Overall survival' section, 'Events' row for 'SOC-alone' column."
  B: value="329" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 6 states 'Deaths were reported in 573/1003 (57%) participants including 329 (66%) in the SOC-alone group and 244 (49%) in the SOC + AAP group'. Also confirmed in Table 2, Page 6, under 'Overall survival' for 'SOC-alone' arm."

---
Column 12: PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What the hazard ratio with confidence intervals of progression-free survival (PFS) of all comparisons in all participants, regardless of metastasis type or volume, in the treatment arm of the trial? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="54% (50-59)" | page=6 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 2, 'Progression-free survival' section, '% event-free at 5 years (95% CI)' row for 'SOC + AAP' column."
  B: value="54% (95% CI: 50-59%)" | page=6 | modality=table | reasoning="Page 6, Table 2, under 'Progression-free survival' for 'SOC ± AAP' arm, '% event-free at 5 years'."

---
Column 13: PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Control
Definition: What hazard ratio with confidence intervals of Progression-Free Survival (PFS) of all comparisons in all participants in the control arm of the trial? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="37% (33-42)" | page=6 | modality=table | reasoning="Extracted from Table 2, 'Progression-free survival' section, '% event-free at 5 years (95% CI)' row for 'SOC-alone' column."
  B: value="37% (95% CI: 33-42%)" | page=6 | modality=table | reasoning="Page 6, Table 2, under 'Progression-free survival' for 'SOC-alone' arm, '% event-free at 5 years'."

---
Column 14: TTPSA (mo) | Treatment
Definition: What time To Progression of Serum Androgen (in months) in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document mentions 'progression that usually included PSA' as part of the definition for treatment continuation, but a specific median 'Time To Progression of Serum Androgen (TTPSA)' in months is not provided for this arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No information found in the provided pages regarding TTPSA."

---
Column 15: TTPSA (mo) | Control
Definition: What time to Progressive Serum Androgen (TTPSA) in months for participants in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document mentions 'progression that usually included PSA' as part of the definition for treatment continuation, but a specific median 'Time To Progression of Serum Androgen (TTPSA)' in months is not provided for this arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No information found in the provided pages regarding TTPSA."


Submit verification for easy columns first. For disputed columns, use get_page then submit.

response.formatted_chunks:
[Page 7]
## Page 7

428



<::IJC INTERNATIONAL JOURNAL OF CANCER
: figure::>



<::Logo: UICC global cancer control::>



JAMES ET AL.



(Table 3, Figure 3) [Correction added on 6 June 2022, after first online publication: The HR and the 95% CI values have been changed from 0.55 to 0.54 and 0.41-0.76 to 0.40-0.74, respectively.]. The effect of SOC + AAP was also observed to be similar in both low-risk and high-risk metastatic disease risk groups for the secondary outcomes of failure-free survival, progression-free survival, metastatic progression-free survival, skeletal-related events and disease-specific survival.



Further treatment was reported for most patients within 1 year of first disease progression (Table S1, Figure S3). Patients allocated to the SOC-alone group were more likely to receive abiraterone or enzalutamide within 1 year (abiraterone, 19% vs 2%, Chi-square P < .0001; enzalutamide, 16% vs 8%, Chi-square P = .002). Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year after first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048).



(A)
<::Kaplan-Meier survival curve plot. The y-axis is "Proportion surviving" ranging from 0.00 to 1.00. The x-axis is "Years from randomisation" ranging from 0 to 8. (B)

Two lines are plotted: a red line representing SOC+AAP and a blue line representing SOC. Shaded areas around the lines indicate confidence intervals. Below the plot, a table provides data:

Median On-Treatment Duration (mo) | Cont.reasoning: Both sources indicate that this information is not reported.

Trial.reasoning: Both sources report the exact same value.
